competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new feature announcement July 8 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: "Claude Cowork" Anthropic what is it sessions shared files (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: CHANGELOG.md一手抓取：较baseline记录的v2.1.202新增v2.1.203（session working directories加入MCP roots listing、修复background session token staleness、修复subagent返回claude agents时work carryover丢失）与v2.1.204（修复SessionStart hooks在headless session中的hook event streaming，防止remote worker在hook执行中被idle-reap）。WebSearch首次发现'Claude Cowork Expansion to Web and Mobile'官方动态：Cowork从桌面扩展至web/mobile，remote sessions/synced files/shared Chat与Cowork home跨设备同步，本次rollout从Max plan开始分阶段推广。另捕获Claude for Government Desktop公测（Claude Code+Cowork进FedRAMP High）、MS 365 write tools（邮件/日历/OneDrive写权限）、Developer Platform新增MCP tunnels研究预览与self-hosted sandboxes。Cowork核心表述：'you can describe an outcome, step away, and come back to finished work'与'sessions and files are saved to your Claude account and go where you go, on any device'。anthropic.com/news本次仍403。
competitors.content_hash: CHANGELOG.md一手抓取：较baseline记录的v2.1.202新增v2.1.203（session working directories加入MCP roots listing、修复background session token stalen

changes.description: CHANGELOG新增v2.1.203/v2.1.204：涉及session工作目录纳入MCP roots listing、background session token staleness修复、SessionStart hook流式修复防止remote worker被idle-reap
changes.evidence: 「Added login expiration warnings, a manual permission mode indicator badge, and session working directories to MCP roots listing.」「Fixed hook event streaming during SessionStart hooks in headless sessions, preventing remote workers from being idle-reaped mid-hook execution.」

changes.description: 首次捕获'Claude Cowork Expansion to Web and Mobile'官方动态：Cowork（与Claude Code同源的agentic架构，无需终端）从桌面扩展至web/mobile，session与文件跨设备同步，从Max plan开始分阶段rollout。baseline未记录Cowork
changes.evidence: 「Claude can take on complex, multi-step tasks and execute them on your behalf... you can describe an outcome, step away, and come back to finished work—formatted documents, organized files, synthesized research, and more.」「Claude expands Cowork to web and mobile, bringing remote sessions, synced files, and shared Chat and Cowork home across devices. This capability is rolling out over the next several weeks starting with the Max plan.」「Cowork runs your sessions remotely (in beta), so your sessions and files are saved to your Claude account and go where you go, on any device. Work continues when you close your laptop, and scheduled tasks run with no device online.」
changes.source_url: WebSearch聚合（anthropic.com/news本次403未能直连，经support.claude.com/venturebeat.com/anthropic.com/product/claude-cowork交叉确认）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'describe an outcome, step away, come back to finished work'与meee2锚点3（descriptive-first，flow从真实行为emerge）在'描述结果→验收产出'的结构上有呼应；'sessions and files...go where you go, on any device'与锚点1（session延续性）在单人跨设备场景下有部分重叠。但未见'人=慢session、AI=快session、同一协议下对等'（锚点1完整表述）、跨owner的artifact live pull（锚点4，官方明确'team sharing coming'尚未上线）或peripheral菜单栏层（锚点5，Cowork是独立全屏产品线）信号。Anthropic作为crit竞品在原有Claude Code之外，进一步将session/artifact延续性扩展到web/mobile非技术用户场景，建议紧密追踪其预告中的team sharing能否补齐锚点4

key_findings: 首次捕获Claude Cowork Web/Mobile扩展，核心表述'描述结果→离开→回来验收'与跨设备session延续，是本次最值得关注的发现
CHANGELOG新增两个版本号（v2.1.203/v2.1.204），均为工程修复，非结构性变化
Claude for Government Desktop公测、MS365 write tools、Developer Platform MCP tunnels等动态与meee2无直接结构重叠
anthropic.com/news本次仍403，持续无法直连

competitors.name: Windsurf (Devin Desktop)
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Devin Desktop Windsurf news update July 8 2026 (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1/2持续403（含新增尝试直连docs.devin.ai/desktop/changelog同样403），转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/7）的新内容：Windsurf新增Claude Opus 4.8支持（常规定价不变，另提供Fast Mode加速使用）；Devin Local更新至2026.5.26；3.1系列发布——Agent/Editor体验优化，Devin Local现在能感知编辑器中打开的文件作为上下文，新增.devinignore支持，MCP工具权限新增'approve all tools on server（当前session/永久）'两档细粒度选项。均为版本迭代与体验优化，未见新的结构性定位变化。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1/2持续403（含新增尝试直连docs.devin.ai/desktop/changelog同样403），转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/7）的新内容：Windsurf新增

changes.description: 新增Claude Opus 4.8支持+Fast Mode、Devin Local升级至2026.5.26、3.1系列（编辑器打开文件上下文感知/.devinignore/MCP工具权限细粒度选项）
changes.evidence: 「Windsurf adds Claude Opus 4.8 with unchanged regular pricing and a new Fast Mode for faster usage.」「Devin Local is now aware of the files you have open in the editor as part of its context.」「When prompted for an MCP tool permission in Devin Local, two additional server-level options are now offered: approve all tools on the server for the current session, or permanently.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'编辑器打开文件作为上下文'与锚点3（descriptive-first）方向浅层呼应，但仍是标准IDE上下文注入机制，非meee2'flow从真实行为emerge'的descriptive范式；MCP权限'current session/permanently'仅为权限颗粒度设置，未触碰核心锚点

key_findings: 本轮发现晚于baseline（7/7）的新版本内容：Claude Opus 4.8集成/Devin Local 2026.5.26/3.1系列
均为模型接入与IDE体验优化，未见结构性定位变化
docs.devin.ai/desktop/changelog官方页本次仍403

competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1两源及help.openai.com持续403，转WebSearch。本轮新增内容（晚于baseline 7/7记录的Canvas实时协作扩展公告）：ChatGPT Excel/Sheets与workspace agent runs对Enterprise/Edu启用token-based credit计费（基于input/cached input/output tokens）；新增/init命令生成AGENTS.md项目说明脚手架；macOS Dock图标自定义；命令菜单新增Unread chats分区；更清晰的usage-limit错误提示；GPT-5.5 Instant Mini上线替代GPT-5.3 Instant Mini作为rate-limit fallback模型。均为baseline未记录的新条目。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1两源及help.openai.com持续403，转WebSearch。本轮新增内容（晚于baseline 7/7记录的Canvas实时协作扩展公告）：ChatGPT Excel/Sheets与workspace agent

changes.description: Excel/Sheets任务与workspace agent runs对Enterprise/Edu启用token-based credit计费
changes.evidence: 「ChatGPT for Excel/Sheets tasks now use token-based credit pricing for Enterprise and Edu workspaces, and workspace agent runs also use token-based credit pricing for Enterprise workspaces, with credit use based on input tokens, cached input tokens, and output tokens.」

changes.description: 新增/init命令生成AGENTS.md项目说明脚手架，及Dock图标自定义/Unread chats分区/更清晰usage-limit提示；GPT-5.5 Instant Mini上线替代GPT-5.3 Instant Mini
changes.evidence: 「Other changes in this release include the /init command for generating an AGENTS.md project-instructions scaffold, customizable macOS Dock icons, an Unread chats section in the command menu, and clearer usage-limit errors with plan and workspace guidance.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：AGENTS.md为项目级agent指令文件，与Claude Code的CLAUDE.md属同类'agent项目配置'范式，是行业通用做法，未触碰meee2'人=慢session/AI=快session同协议'（锚点1）或跨工具live link（锚点2）等核心结构

key_findings: 本轮新增内容均为定价/工具配置类更新，未见新的结构性产品方向
GPT-5.5 Instant Mini替换GPT-5.3 Instant Mini作为fallback模型

competitors.content_hash: PH官方feed/日榜页/HN持续403，转WebSearch。核实7/7 Best of Product Hunt日榜：Ellis（会议AI笔记）、Ogment AI（Slack内'@O' AI coworker，连接1

changes.description: Framer AI Agents——Framer设计工具新增External Agents连接能力，Claude Code/Cursor/Codex/Antigravity CLI等外部编码agent可直接读写Framer canvas/组件/CMS，AI改动保持canvas可编辑（非仅代码），content与design双向同步。命中watch_keywords：agent、canvas（2项，达到阈值），建议持续观察
changes.evidence: 「The native Framer External Agent connection gives Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Antigravity CLI, and other AI tools direct access to your canvas, components, CMS, and project context, without manual MCP setup.」「Framer Agents work on actual site pages while keeping AI changes editable on the canvas instead of only in code.」「The AI agent works in your CMS directly to the canvas so content and design always stay in sync.」
changes.source_url: https://www.producthunt.com/leaderboard/daily/2026/7/7（一手PH页本次403未能直连，经framer.com官网及WebSearch聚合确认）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'多个外部编码agent（Claude Code/Cursor/Codex）直接读写同一canvas，AI改动实时保持可编辑且与design同步'在'跨工具artifact live link（非snapshot）'层面与meee2锚点2有较具体的结构呼应；但未见'人=慢session、AI=快session、同协议对等'（锚点1）、跨owner的artifact pull（锚点4）或peripheral菜单栏层（锚点5）信号，且Framer核心定位仍是网站设计发布工具而非workspace/session管理产品，综合判定结构重叠为中等强度，暂不构成threat_signal，建议持续观察其canvas live-link能力是否扩展至更通用的workspace定位

key_findings: 7/7 PH日榜新发现Framer新增External Agents canvas live-link能力，命中watch_keywords阈值但综合判定暂不构成threat_signal
Ogment AI（Slack AI coworker）、Ellis、TypeaheadAI描述信息不足以判定keyword命中，未记录为entrant
PH官方feed与日榜/产品详情页本次持续403

alerts.headline: Anthropic首次官方披露Claude Cowork扩展至Web/Mobile：'描述结果→离开→回来验收'+跨设备session延续，是Anthropic自身产品线中与meee2结构最接近的动态
alerts.evidence: 「Claude can take on complex, multi-step tasks and execute them on your behalf... you can describe an outcome, step away, and come back to finished work—formatted documents, organized files, synthesized research, and more.」「Cowork runs your sessions remotely (in beta), so your sessions and files are saved to your Claude account and go where you go, on any device.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 建议密切追踪Anthropic官方预告的Cowork team sharing能力上线情况——若补齐跨owner的artifact live pull（meee2锚点4），Cowork将从'描述式任务执行'进一步逼近meee2的核心结构；同时评估meee2在'人=慢session、AI=快session同协议对等'与'peripheral菜单栏层，不切焦点'两个锚点上的差异化传播是否需要加强，因为Cowork目前仍是独立全屏session产品，未覆盖这两点。
